kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

test.name: TC-LOGOUT-NEG-01 User Should Login Before Checkout After Logout

kw.name: Navigate To Login Page
Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.view.ViewGroup[@content-desc="menu item log in"] xpath criteria: //android.view.ViewGroup[@content-desc="menu item log in"]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Membuka menu dan masuk ke halaman Login

kw.name: Input Login Credentials
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'bob@example.com' into text field 'xpath=//android.widget.EditText[@content-desc="Username input field"]'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '10203040' into text field 'xpath=//android.widget.EditText[@content-desc="Password input field"]'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Mengisi username dan password di form login

kw.name: Tap Login Button
Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Menekan tombol Login

kw.name: User Should Be Logged In
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.
Verifikasi user berhasil login tampil halaman products

kw.name: Perform Logout
Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.view.ViewGroup[@content-desc="menu item log out"] xpath criteria: //android.view.ViewGroup[@content-desc="menu item log out"]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Melakukan logout dari aplikasi

kw.name: User Should Be Logged Out
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Verifikasi user sudah ter-logout

kw.name: Checkout Item
Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.view.ViewGroup[@content-desc="menu item catalog"] xpath criteria: //android.view.ViewGroup[@content-desc="menu item catalog"]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@content-desc="store item text" and @text="Sauce Labs Backpack"]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//android.widget.TextView[@content-desc="store item text" and @text="Sauce Labs Backpack"]'.
xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@content-desc="store item text" and @text="Sauce Labs Backpack"]
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text="Add To Cart"] xpath criteria: //android.widget.TextView[@text="Add To Cart"]
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Clicks the element identified by ``locator``.
Checkout Item

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element specified by the ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: Verifikasi user harus login untuk bisa checkout setelah logout

kw.name: Close My App
Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and the webdriver session.
Menutup koneksi Appium setelah test selesai
